sys_script_client.description:
2.5.3 STRY0086102 - "Run Template" does not update the template form
Embeds the "Discovertasker-modal-prompt" widget in a modal. Prompts the user to enter an objective and Instance notation for the process template they intend on running,. Triggerd by "Run Process Template Notation" UI Action.
sys_script_client.name: Temp - onSubmit Prompt Instance Notation
